name: simon_setup
description: Simon install-pack setup tool. Generates canonical family registry previews, install/bootstrap runbooks, and per-user workspace seed docs for new Simon deployments.

required_fields.name: family_timezone
required_fields.prompt: Primary family timezone for Simon deployments

required_fields.name: primary_parent_identity
required_fields.prompt: Canonical identity for the primary parent

required_fields.name: primary_parent_display_name
required_fields.prompt: Display name for the primary parent

required_fields.name: primary_parent_language
required_fields.prompt: Preferred language for the primary parent (en or he)

required_fields.name: second_parent_identity
required_fields.prompt: Canonical identity for the second parent

required_fields.name: second_parent_display_name
required_fields.prompt: Display name for the second parent

required_fields.name: second_parent_language
required_fields.prompt: Preferred language for the second parent (en or he)

required_fields.name: second_parent_status
required_fields.prompt: Initial status for the second parent (active or dormant)
